Independent Market Research

The numbers don't lie.

Every chart below is sourced from Wood Mackenzie, the industry's gold standard for independent installer tracking. Proprietary, verifiable, and unambiguous.

Source: Wood Mackenzie Residential Solar Market Research  .  Annual kW installed by installer, Connecticut, 2015 to 2025. Trinity's dashed line is a linear trend. The shaded band represents a +/-35% stability corridor.

About this data: Wood Mackenzie compiles residential solar market share from state rebate programs, utility interconnection records, equipment supplier data, and GTM Research/SEIA U.S. Solar Market Insight reports. Access requires a significant commercial license and is not publicly available, but rankings are independently verifiable through Connecticut PURA interconnection records and DEEP program filings.

Source: Wood Mackenzie Residential Solar Market Research  .  Total kW installed, Connecticut, 2025. Trinity's 31,157 kW is nearly four times the next active installer in the state.

About this data: Rankings are determined from rebate programs, utilities, installers, developers, equipment suppliers, and GTM Research/SEIA U.S. Solar Market Insight reports. Proprietary and not publicly available, but verifiable through Connecticut PURA interconnection records and DEEP program data.

Choosing a solar installer means choosing a partner for decades, so who will actually be there when you call? We don't just survive in this industry. We lead it.

Trinity Solar  .  Energy with Integrity®  .  Est. 1993

Why It Matters to You

Your installer should outlast your system.

A solar system is a 25-year commitment. The data above shows clearly which companies will be here for it, and which won't.

📈

Steady, Responsible Growth

Trinity has never overextended, never collapsed. Our growth has been consistent and healthy for over a decade, built on service, not speculation.

🏆

Unmatched CT Leadership

In 2025, Trinity installed nearly 4x more kW than our nearest active competitor in Connecticut. Deeper supplier relationships, faster installs, more experienced crews.

🤝

A Partner, Not a Transaction

We've been here for 32 years. When others have exited or stopped answering, Trinity customers have always had someone to call.

🏠

Total Home Solutions

Beyond solar, roofing, batteries, and EV charging, all backed by industry-leading warranties from the same team protecting CT homes for three decades.
